mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_achievements (user_id, achievement_id, progress, unlocked_at) VALUES (#{ua.userId}, #{ua.achievementId}, #{ua.progress}, NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE progress = CASE WHEN progress < #{ua.progress} THEN #{ua.progress} ELSE progress END, unlocked_at = CASE WHEN unlocked_at IS NULL AND #{ua.progress} >= 100 THEN NOW() ELSE unlocked_at END
